message:
feat(sql): add ARRAY literal parsing and fix ARRAY_SLICE

- Add ARRAY token to TokenType and KEYWORDS in both main and worker
- Implement parseArrayLiteral() for parsing [1,2,3] and ARRAY[1,2,3]
- Add ARRAY keyword handling in parsePrimary with subscript support
- Add array/subscript evaluation in both evaluateExpr functions
- Fix parseFunctionArg in worker to handle ARRAY as function argument
- Fix ARRAY_SLICE to use 1-based indexing for both start and end
